name: local-computer-use
description: Local black-box Computer Use reimplementation for macOS fixture testing.

interface.shortDescription: Run the local Computer Use-like MCP server
interface.longDescription: Local Computer Use packages this repository's black-box macOS Computer Use reimplementation as a distinct Codex plugin for safe fixture testing and compatibility work. It is intentionally separate from the bundled OpenAI Computer Use plugin.
defaultPrompt: List apps with Local Computer Use
Run the local M11 fixture gate
